message: 🌱 Add clusternet: cannot deploy demo application, hub and agent have some mission (#650)

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clusternet-656-cannot-deploy-demo-application-hub-and-agent-have-some-error-logs",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clusternet: cannot deploy demo application, hub and agent have some error logs",
+    "description": "cannot deploy demo application, hub and agent have some error logs. This issue affects 0+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify clusternet troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your clusternet deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n clusternet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=clusternet\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=clusternet -n clusternet --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review clusternet configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant clusternet configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n clusternet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=clusternet\nkubectl get configmap -n clusternet -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=clusternet\n```\n#### What happened:\n\nI use `hack/local-running.sh` to create one parent cluster and three child clusters. But I cannot deploy demo application, there is nothing happened.\n\n#### What you expected to happen:\n\nthe demo application is here."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for cannot deploy demo application, hub and agent have some",
+        "description": "Please help verify below parts.\n\n1. Make sure that all Clusternet components are running correctly. `kubectl get pod -n clusternet-system`.\n2. Install `kubectl clusternet` plugin.\n\n    ```bash\n    kubectl clusternet get ns\n    ```\n\n    Above command should work correctly.\n\n3. Make sure you've\n```yaml\n> kubectl get base -A\n>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm cannot deploy demo application, hub and agent is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=clusternet -n clusternet --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n clusternet --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Please help verify below parts.\n\n1. Make sure that all Clusternet components are running correctly. `kubectl get pod -n clusternet-system`.\n2. Install `kubectl clusternet` plugin.\n\n    ```bash\n    kubectl clusternet get ns\n    ```\n\n    Above command should work correctly.\n\n3. Make sure you've updated the `spec.subscribers.clusterAffinity.matchLabels`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> kubectl get base -A\n>",
+        "> > kubectl get base -A\n> >",
+        "> > > kubectl get base -A\n> > >"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
